positive: A majestic, highly stylized solar system nebula viewed through a minimalist, art deco lens. The central focus is a stylized planet emitting a soft, glowing bioluminescent glow (like deep sapphire and emerald gradients). Surround the planet with elegant, abstract constellations formed by flowing lines and crystalline geometric shapes. The composition must be perfectly centered and circular, suitable for an apparel repeat pattern. Utilize deep indigo, cosmic purple, iridescent teal, and brilliant gold accents. The style should be a blend of psychedelic vaporwave and vintage celestial cartography, with clean, bold lines and strong, graphic contrast against a deep, velvety black background. Minimal shading, maximum impactful glow. High contrast, symmetrical, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, writing, logo, signature, messy, cluttered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, photo, realistic, 3d render
